ValidationRule.description: This rule forces users to enter a Primary Delay and Delay Comment when the Actual Date is later than the Projected Date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( pro_Actual_Date__c > pro_Projected_Date__c, OR( ISBLANK(TEXT( pro_Primary_Delay__c )), pro_Delay_Comment__c = Null ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Actual Date is later than the Projected Date. The fields Primary Delay and Delay Comment must be populated.
